promotions.fact: HSM earned $19.6M in rebates/allowances + $38.7M in admin fees + $8.76M in direct sales from franchisees of all Hilton brands in 2024
Hilton affiliates earned $1.1 billion in revenue from sales of goods/services/systems to franchisees in 2024 (excluding royalties, program fees, HSM amounts)
OnQ system must be refreshed every 3 years; Guest Internet Access every 4 years
Application fee was reduced to $0-$100,000 in 29 instances in 2024; royalty fee modified in 29 instances
promotions.source: Reader report Pass B / Item 5 Note 1 and Item 6 Note 1

promotions.fact: HSM late payment interest rate is 18.5%/year compounded daily
promotions.source: Reader report Pass B / Item 5 Note 4

promotions.fact: Hilton JV Acquisition LLC holds non-controlling equity interest in Groups360 LLC (group booking platform)
Strategic Partnerships: Small Luxury Hotels, Autocamp, Evermore Resort, Field Station
